# Agent File Test Corpus

Real-world agent definition files collected from public GitHub repositories for testing Forgent's doctor analysis pipeline and format fidelity suite.

## Collection Details

- Initial collection: 2026-03-30
- Extended: 2026-04-15 (Story 5.3 — Format Fidelity Test Suite)
- Method: GitHub Code Search API via `gh search code` + manual collection
- Synthetic files: 13 Copilot agent files created to cover diverse domain patterns
- Criteria: Public repositories with agent definition files
- License: All from public repositories (verified accessible)
- Purpose: Format fidelity test suite — validate parser correctness across real-world files
